findings.title: SQL Injection via direct string concatenation in product search
findings.description: User-supplied request parameter concatenated directly into SQL LIKE clause without parameterization

findings.title: SQL Injection via category concatenation and unvalidated ORDER BY direction
findings.description: Category parameter concatenated into WHERE clause and order direction interpolated into ORDER BY without validation

findings.title: SQL Injection via StringBuilder append in order listing filters
findings.description: Status, dateFrom, and dateTo parameters appended directly into StringBuilder SQL query despite base query using parameterization

findings.title: SQL Injection via direct concatenation in DELETE statement
findings.description: Category request parameter concatenated directly into DELETE SQL statement without parameterization
